conventiondeclaration.abbr: Finding aid prepared according to Visual Resources Collection local practices.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Tuesday November 20, 2018 at 00:00
Converted for better (but not full) compliance with Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines with vrc-migrate.xsl (mr2007-03-28).
Swedish, Swiss and Yugoslavian Painting converted from EAD 1.0 to 2002 by v1to02.xsl (sy2003-10-15).
Transformed with yale.addEadidUrl.xsl. Adds @url with handle for finding aid. Overwrites @url if already present.

did.abstract: Collection of mounted black and white and color reproductions of paintings from Sweden, Switzerland and the former Yugoslavia [now Serbia and Montenegro].Content varies from original photographic prints to reproductions from magazines and other published sources. Some sections have accompanying clippings folders.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Copyright has not been transferred to Yale University. Further use of this material may be subject to the copyright laws of the United States (Title 17, United States Code), or to site license or other rights management terms or conditions.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Swedish-Yugoslavian Painting Photograph Collection, Arts Library, Yale University

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: These materials are stored offsite at the Library Shelving Facility. For access to the materials, please make a request at the Art & Architecture Library.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Organized alphabetically by individual artist name. The individual artist material is further divided primarily by location of work.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Collection of mounted black and white and color reproductions of paintings from Sweden, Switzerland and the former Yugoslavia [now Serbia and Montenegro]. Content varies from original photographic prints to reproductions from magazines and other published sources. Some sections have accompanying clippings folders.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes a folder of miscellaneous clippings.

did.unittitle: Blomquist, Gunilla, and Hammarberg, Jorgen, XX C.

did.unittitle: Jurjev, Blaz, XV or XVI C.
